div.head: The Ambassador in Great Britain (Harvey) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
644. Your 437, August 2, 4 p.m. I have just received through French Ambassador, London, and our Embassy, Paris, official invitation to Supreme Council which will meet in Paris Monday August
8th, during the session of which myself and staff are to be guests of the French Government. I have accepted through same channels and will leave London Saturday morning accompanied by Wright,J. Butler Wright, counselor of the Embassy at London. LaneArthur Bliss Lane, second secretary of the Embassy at London. and two stenographers. I am so informing Embassy at Paris and also General AllenMaj. Gen. Henry T. Allen, American observer on the Rhineland High Commission. and would appreciate if latter might be instructed to join me in Paris by Sunday at the latest.
I suggest that henceforth all telegrams relative to Supreme Council or those intended for my personal guidance be addressed through Embassy Paris.
